name: svg-with-script
description: SVG carrying an inline <script>. SVG's XML attack surface (event handlers, foreignObject, javascript: URIs) is intentional XML feature territory, not a polyglot. The normaliser passes SVG through untouched; the fixture asserts that the operator-documented mitigation (drop image/svg+xml from BLOB_MIME_ALLOWLIST when rendering untrusted SVGs inline) is the right one to advertise.
